857 ROUTE_PRVDR_OTHR_CD ROUTE_PRVDR_OTHR_CD A2122E Provider Trans - Other Methods CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates that the route(s) of transmission of the current reconciled medication list to the subsequent provider was an other method (e.g., texting, email, CDs) 0=No
1=Yes effective 10/01/2023
